title: WsStatusSnapshot
description: JSON output of `winter ws status --json` (schema_version 1). All diagnostics go to stderr; this document appears on stdout only.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Consumers should reject or warn on unexpected values.

environments.description: One EnvSnapshot per matching feature environment. Filtered by patterns when patterns are given.

source_checkouts.description: One SourceCheckoutSnapshot per source checkout. Always the full workspace view regardless of patterns.

workspace.description: Workspace-level snapshot — extensions, orphans, config drift. Always the full workspace view.

dashboard.description: Configured and resolved dashboard grid layout for the current workspace shape. Reflects the whole-workspace view regardless of patterns.

resolved_layout.description: Concrete layout the configured value resolves to for the current workspace shape; equals configured_layout unless it is "auto", which resolves via the same heuristic the dashboard TUI grid uses (documented in ai/winter-cli/usage/dashboard.md).

index.description: Persisted port-offset index for this env (from .winter/state.toml).

port_base.description: Assigned port base (base_port + index * ports_per_env; defaults to 4000 + index * 20).

feature_branch.description: Remote feature branch this env tracks, or null when not connected.

worktrees.description: One WorktreeSnapshot per matching repo worktree. Filtered by patterns when patterns are given.

upstream.description: Configured remote-tracking ref (e.g. "origin/master"), or null when none is set.

tracking_ahead.description: Commits ahead of the configured upstream ref.

tracking_behind.description: Commits behind the configured upstream ref.

tracking_ref_present.description: Whether the upstream tracking ref resolves in the local git store.

last_commit_subject.description: First line of the most recent commit message, or null when the branch has no commits beyond origin/<main>.

pinned.description: Whether the repo is pinned to its main branch.

branch.description: Current local branch in the source checkout.

ahead_origin.description: Commits ahead of origin/<main-branch> (shouldn't happen on a well-managed main checkout).

dirty.description: Count of changed files (staged + unstaged + untracked) in the source checkout.

drift.description: Drift findings for this checkout (e.g. missing declared sub-paths). Empty array when clean.

root_path.description: Absolute path to the workspace root.

extensions.description: Names of installed standalone repos (extensions). A config-only read.

orphans.description: Filesystem entries with no declared owner.

drift_missing.description: Repo names declared in config but absent on disk (run `winter ws init` to fix).

drift_undeclared.description: Directory names present under projects/ but not in config.

standalone_pins.description: One StandalonePinSnapshot per declared standalone repo that has a ref configured.

kind.description: Short label for the orphan type (e.g. "worktree_dir").

safe_to_remove.description: Whether `winter ws prune` would remove this without a blocker.

notes.description: Human-readable explanation of why this is an orphan or why it can't be removed.

ref.description: The ref string currently declared in the config (branch name, tag, or commit SHA).

kind.description: How the ref was classified at the last ws update or ws init. null when no lock entry exists yet.

locked_commit.description: Full 40-char SHA recorded in .winter/config.lock at the last pin operation. null when no lock entry exists.

config_ref_drift.description: true when the config's ref differs from the ref recorded in the lock file.

head_drift.description: true when the standalone's current HEAD commit does not match locked_commit.

head_commit.description: Current HEAD commit of the standalone repo (full 40-char SHA), or null when absent on disk.
